info.name: Rohu kasa
info.description: A flavorful and spicy fish curry with a rich and aromatic gravy with pieces of potato.(serves one)

info.name: Chicken curry [quarter, 2 pieces]

info.name: Rohu kasa
info.description: A flavorful and spicy fish curry with a rich and aromatic gravy with pieces of potato.(serves one)

info.name: Steam rohu
info.description: Tender and succulent rohu fish steamed to perfection,with yogurt & mustard gravy, preserving its delicate flavors and natural juiciness. Perfect match with fine rice.(serves one)

info.name: Hilsha vapa
info.description: A flavorful and tender steamed fish dish with mustard paste & green chilly that is a must-try for seafood lovers.

info.name: Jumbo prawns malai curry
info.description: Juicy jumbo prawns with heads, tenderly  cooked in a rich, creamy coconut milkwith aromatic Indian spices. It is a delicious, traditional Bengali delicacy.

info.name: Chitol peti korma
info.description: A rich flavored,  creamy fish curry that is sure to tantalize your taste buds. Cooked with cashew & all types of Indian spices.

info.name: Bhetki dry jhal
info.description: A flavorful and savory Bengali fish dish with a whole portion of bhetki cooked in mustard gravy & garnished with green chlly & coriander leaves.(serves one)

info.name: Pabda
info.description: A delectable, less spicy fish dish with small pieces of brinjals in  rich flavors(with jeera & dhania paste) and succulent textures.(serves one)

info.name: Pomfret dry jhal
info.description: A flavorful and aromatic fish dish with a whole portion of Pomfret,cooked in delicious & mouth watering dry mustard gravy, perfect delicacy for seafood lovers.(serves one)

info.name: Rice
info.description: Serves one.

info.name: Veg sabji
info.description: A flavorful and lip smacking vegetable curry suitable with rice.(serves one)

info.name: Moong dal
info.description: A comforting and hearty dal made with yellow split mung beans that is sure to warm your soul.

info.name: Aloo jhuri bhaja
info.description: Crispy fried potato strips that are sure to satisfy your craving for something crunchy and delicious.

info.name: Posto bora
info.description: Crispy fried fritters with a flavorful poppy seed paste mixed with onion& green chilly, a delightful veg dish to savor.

info.name: Pomfret fry
info.description: Crispy, golden-fried pomfret that is bursting with flavor and perfect for seafood lovers.

info.name: Fish fry
info.description: Crispy, golden-brown fried bhetki fillet(marinated) that is sure to satisfy your cravings for a really tasty snacks

info.name: Bhetki Paturi
info.description: Delicate fish coated in a flavorful marinade and fried to perfection,wrapped in banana leaf. A true delicacy of Bengali cuisine.

info.name: Maachher dim bora
info.description: Crispy fried fish eggs fritters bursting with flavor and texture. Perfectly suits with rice & dal.

info.name: Chutney
info.description: A sweet and tangy condiment bursting with vibrant flavors, perfect for adding a burst of excitement to any meal.

info.name: Misti doi [100 g]
info.description: Creamy and sweet traditional Bengali dessert,prepared of full cream milk.

info.name: Cold beverage [250 ml]

info.name: Dhania Chicken
info.description: Two big pieces of chicken legs cooked in tasty gravy with special coriander leaves paste.

info.name: Chicken Dakbunglow
info.description: Two tender chicken leg pieces with one chicken egg,one whole portion of potato & onion.Cooked in woodfire with a spicy thick gravy.A must try yummy dish with rice or tawa roti.

info.description: Topsey fish(1piece) marinated & fried in low flame. Crispy,mouthwatering.

info.description: A deliciousl and spicy lentils(mixed)cooked woth egg. It perfectly goes with Tawa Roti.

info.name: Veg tadka
